nasb.text: Shall He recompense on your terms, because you have rejected it? For you must choose, and not I; Therefore declare what you know.

esv.text: Will he then make repayment to suit you, because you reject it? For you must choose, and not I; therefore declare what you know.

cnv.text: 神會因你拒絕悔改， 就遵照你的心意嗎？ 要作抉擇的是你，不是我， 你所知道的，只管說出來吧。

ccb.text: 难道因为你拒绝接受， 上帝就要迎合你的要求吗？ 要做抉择的是你，而非我， 请说说你的高见。
